summary: Iteration 31 — 10/10 tests pass for MEJORA 1-4 (memoria y contexto IA). Found and fixed 1 critical bug: KeyError 'cuentas_contables' in ai_chat.py line 1470 that caused all /api/chat/message calls to return 503.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: ai_chat.py line 1470 — `context_data['cuentas_contables']` raised KeyError when actividad_hoy was present but message didn't contain causacion keywords (cuentas_contables is only populated conditionally). Fixed to `context_data.get('cuentas_contables', [])`. This was causing ALL /api/chat/message calls to return 503.
TEST 2 PASS: POST /api/chat/tarea creates doc with tipo='tarea_activa', estado='en_curso' ✅
TEST 3 PASS: GET /api/chat/tarea returns en_curso tarea ✅
TEST 4 PASS: PATCH /api/chat/tarea/avance updates pasos_completados=1, removes 'Paso A' from pendientes ✅
TEST 5 PASS: 'pausa la tarea' → returns ⏸️ confirmation + changes estado to 'pausada' ✅
TEST 6 PASS: 'continúa la tarea' → returns ▶️ confirmation + changes estado to 'en_curso' ✅
TEST 7 PASS: '¿en qué íbamos?' → returns direct context response without 503 ✅
TEST 8 PASS: 3 messages in same session; history has >= 4 items before 3rd message ✅
TEST 9 PASS: /api/chat/tarea returns 401 without auth, 200 with auth ✅
TEST 10 PASS: All keywords (raw_history, initial_messages, summary_msg, tarea_activa, actividad_hoy) found in ai_chat.py ✅
seed_data_creation: Test tarea_activa created in agent_memory during tests (auto-replaced by cleanup logic in POST /tarea).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 MEJORA 1-4 tests pass. Critical bug fixed: ai_chat.py L1470 KeyError 'cuentas_contables' → now uses .get() with default []. Tarea activa endpoints (GET/POST/PATCH /api/chat/tarea) all work. Special commands (pausa/continúa/¿en qué íbamos?) return direct responses without calling Claude. Historial persistente works: session messages stored in db.chat_messages and loaded in subsequent requests.
rca_of_issue: RCA: In ai_chat.py's process_chat, the block starting at line 1465 `if context_data.get('actividad_hoy'):` also unconditionally accessed `context_data['cuentas_contables']` at line 1470. However, `cuentas_contables` is only injected into context when the user message contains causacion keywords (line 853). For all other messages (including special commands like 'pausa la tarea'), actividad_hoy could be populated from roddos_events while cuentas_contables would be absent, causing KeyError → unhandled exception → 503. Fix: changed dict access to .get() with empty list default.
